positive: A mesmerizing, symmetrical celestial botanical wreath composed of glowing lunar vines, stylized constellations, and iridescent, bioluminescent flowers. The style should mimic intricate etched stained glass mixed with elegant Art Nouveau linework, achieving a high-contrast, graphic silhouette. Color palette is deep indigo, cosmic teal, metallic gold, and luminous pearl white. The composition is centered and circular, designed for optimal apparel printing, featuring strong rim lighting and a deep, velvety midnight background. Intricate details, flat vector graphic quality, high saturation, clean lines, highly detailed, symmetrical, centerpiece design.
